serena_lsp: 23 tools stable R4-25. activate_project --project ~1.3s warm. find_symbol broad 70s+ (prefer Grep). Receiver methods need '(*Type).method'. Dynamic Workflow tool needs manual review — do audits directly via Grep/Read.

open_issues.sg26a1_R26: seenmapbool (NEW 20th linter, registered cmd/linters/main.go:35 import/59 register; pkg/linters/seenmapbool/seenmapbool.go). Flags LOCAL map[string]bool used as set (only assigned true via IndexExpr) -> recommend map[string]struct{}. NO //nolint support (no nolint import) -> fix-to-zero ONLY enforce path. UNENFORCED (not in cgo.yml:1040). NOT near-zero: 60+ non-test local set decls (266 total occ/156 files incl tests) across pkg/workflow(domains.go 9, on_needs_validation 6),pkg/cli,pkg/parser -> large refactor, NOT clean-enforce. PRECISION GAP: inspectBody(seenmapbool.go:128-157) scans only declaring-func body for non-true writes; blind to ESCAPE(return/arg/struct-field/closure). >=12 flagged decls returned directly(toImportSet import_topological:48->52, managedPatternsWithInlineComment dependabot:614->625, buildForbiddenFieldsMap schema_validation:37, computeEnabledToolNames, findCycleNodes, DetectKnownCredentialLeakingActions) so struct{} fix is non-local(sig+all callers) & potential cross-func false positive if caller writes non-true. Issue filed sg26a1: add escape filter to inspectBody (drop candidate if returned/passed/stored/captured), re-measure residual local-only set, THEN enforce. Landable angle = single-file linter precision improvement (self_consistency/linter-quality pattern), NOT the dismissed 'refactor N sites' framing.
open_issues.sgbo1_defensible: 2 filepath.Join variants intentional: cli/git.go:303 trailing-slash, cli/fix_command.go:410 Separator-suffix.

patterns.ci_enforce: cgo.yml:1040 POSITIVE LINTER_FLAGS. R25=10 flags: -errstringmatch -panicinlibrarycode -manualmutexunlock -osexitinlibrary -rawloginlib -regexpcompileinfunction -fprintlnsprintf -strconvparseignorederror -jsonmarshalignoredeerror -uncheckedtypeassertion. Append for zero-vio; refactor///nolint first for non-zero.
patterns.enforce_landed_4consec: PROVEN R22->R23->R24->R25: audit registered-but-unenforced linter -> fix-to-zero -> file enforce issue = HIGHEST-ROI, lands within the week. Re-filing dismissed prod-site issues does NOT land. Frame as 'fix N trivial sites then enforce', NOT 'refactor N sites'.
patterns.wasm_build_tag: *_wasm.go files carry IMPLICIT GOARCH=wasm constraint via filename (no //go:build needed). Host (linux) golint-custom EXCLUDES them. So enforce-readiness counts ONLY non-wasm-tagged violations. Inverse for linux-only files. Always partition grep hits by build constraint before claiming 'N enforceable'.
patterns.self_consistency: Linter framework's own analyzers should pass enforced linters. sg24a1 (2 newest analyzers regressed two-value ResultOf) was clean landable ask — RESOLVED R25.

NOTE: seenmapbool is FIRST registered linter in 5 runs that is NOT near-zero -> enforce-landing fast pattern may STALL (refactor-heavy). If sg26a1 escape-filter lands, residual local-only seenmapbool sites become incrementally convertible file-by-file. Other pivots still open: (a) errormessage opt-in scope, (b) ctxbackground 28-site scoped refactor, (c) fmterrorfnoverbs+seenmapbool both lack //nolint (no nolint.BuildLineIndex) — propose adding BuildLineIndex for parity with siblings. Registry grew 19->20 this run (~1 new linter / few runs).

bash_policy: Sandbox blocks: multi-stmt compounds, mkdir/ls/find-exec/wc/cat/sed outside repo, for-loops, backtick grep (cmd subst), heredoc, git on /tmp. go build blocked (lint via Grep/Read). gh issue/search list --json 'Malformed version:'; gh api search/issues label query returns null items — open-issue check unreliable, rely on memory+7d expiry. Glob/Read/Write work on /tmp; bash CANNOT write/read /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory (use Write/Edit; append via Edit on unique tail). /tmp/gh-aw/agent/ bash-writable. safeoutputs `. < file.json`. KEEP MEMORY FILES SMALL — 10KB patch limit; prefer Edit over full Write rewrites.
